name: Default Educational Tracks
description: Recommended learning sequences through the college subject pool

tracks.name: STEM Foundation
tracks.description: A ground-up path through core STEM disciplines, starting with math and building toward applied sciences

tracks.name: Digital Literacy Path
tracks.description: From digital basics to data science and cloud systems

tracks.name: Humanities Breadth
tracks.description: Reading, writing, communication, history, and philosophy for well-rounded human inquiry

tracks.name: Wellness Practitioner
tracks.description: Mind, body, and nutrition sciences for holistic health understanding

tracks.name: Federation Onboarding
tracks.description: From newcomer to contributor in the Wasteland federation — Dolt, trust levels, stamps, and community
tracks.notes: Maps to the wasteland-newcomer pack. Circular path: pack -> stamp -> college -> next pack.
